name: HubSpot MCP
description: HubSpot CRM via HubSpot remote MCP (OAuth + PKCE). Registers HubSpot tools as native OpenClaw tools.

toolPrefix.description: Prefix for registered tool names (e.g. hubspot → hubspot_get_user_details). Use empty string for no prefix.

sessionPath.description: Optional path to OAuth session JSON (tokens, PKCE verifier). Overrides HUBSPOT_MCP_TOKEN_PATH.

hubspotMcpUrl.description: Optional HubSpot MCP base URL. Overrides HUBSPOT_MCP_URL (default https://mcp.hubspot.com/).
